decisions_made.rationale: Sequential with dependencies T1→T2→T3→T4→T5 ensures incremental testability and reduces integration risk
T4 and T5 address all three ACs to ensure no single-task failure blocks validation
Per established conventions (REC-005), no separate test task needed; each task includes unit and integration tests in DoD

key_findings: Story is testing-only synthetic fixture validation; not production feature work
Multi-agent workflow architecture well-established with artifact path conventions and evaluator gates
AC coverage matrix mandatory per REC-005; all three ACs have ≥3 task mappings
Testing is integrated in task DoD; no separate test task needed per established conventions
Task dependencies enable parallel work (T1, T2, T3 independent after T1 completed)

librarian_knowledge_used.task_plan_schema: ac_coverage_matrix required, all ACs must be mapped
librarian_knowledge_used.testing_conventions: Harness pattern, Cypress component tests, Jest unit tests, data-test-id selectors

notes: Intake artifacts were already generated with high confidence (95%). Task planning validated against librarian knowledge and confirmed all established conventions are followed. No ambiguities or open questions identified.
